gist.headline: Traffic control
gist.blurb: We've rerouted Gemini 2.5 Flash-lite traffic back to its previous home to dodge some pesky quota limits. Smooth chatting is back on the menu.
gist.summary: Reverted the recent Google Cloud project migration for Gemini 2.5 Flash-lite to resolve Vertex AI quota limits.
gist.impact: Users will experience reliable, uninterrupted access to the Gemini 2.5 Flash-lite model.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a traffic controller, redirecting glowing data streams (representing Gemini traffic) away from a congested, tiny pipe (restrictive quota) into a large, flowing pipe. Nomnom creature happily eating the smooth-flowing data.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny traffic controller hat, directing glowing blue data streams away from a small clogged pipe into a large, smooth-flowing pipe. The round Nomnom creature sits nearby, happily eating the flowing data. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
